title: FAMILY MEDIATION SERVICES - 211info
text: CENTER FOR DIALOGUE AND RESOLUTION FAMILY MEDIATION SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers mediation and conflict coaching services for disputes involving families, including parent-youth issues, elder issues, sibling issues, domestic relations, financial-only dissolutions, and parenting plans. Also provides specialized programs for mediation with foster families. 1400 Cross Street Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm. Mediation can be conducted outside of these hours as needed. Email (541) 344-5366 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 344-5366 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Sliding scale fee depending on income DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Mediation * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Mediation * Divorce/Custody/Support Issues Mediation * Older Adult/Aging Issues Mediation * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - TRAINING AND EDUCATION LEGAL ASSISTANCE MODALITIES - MEDIATION SERVICES ORGANIZATIONAL DEVELOPMENT AND MANAGEMENT SERVICES - ORGANIZATIONAL FACILITATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CENTER FOR DIALOGUE AND RESOLUTION
